text:
May 3, 2018–April 24, 2023. 

For each navigation-eligible beneficiary who opted in for and received navigation services (i.e., non-
missing NC_NVGTN_CASE_ID), this field indicates the date the navigation case was opened. Toward 
the end of the model, CMS advised bridge organizations to try to provide at least 3 months of 
navigation to those who opted in for navigation services.
